title: App Settings - General - Licenses - License Link (MIT,Apache2.0.....)
scenario: Verify that tapping license links in App Settings > General > Licenses displays Source and License links, and that License links open a view with headline, description, and Cancel button, and that licenses also appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
steps: Tap each license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0).
Verify that two links are displayed: Source and License link.
Verify that a view opens with a headline, description, and a Cancel button (X) in the upper right corner.
Verify that the same licenses appear in the Acknowledgements list.
expected: Each license link displays Source and License links. Tapping License link opens a view with a headline, description, and a Cancel button (X) in the upper right corner. The same licenses appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
